text: You Turned My Mourning into Dancing

segments.text: I will exalt You, O LORD, for You have lifted me up and have not allowed my foesto rejoice over me.
O LORD my God, I cried to You for help, and You healed me.
O LORD, You pulled me up from Sheol; You spared me from descending into the Pit.
Sing to the LORD, O you His saints, and praise His holy name.
For His anger is fleeting, but His favor lasts a lifetime. Weeping may stay the night, but joy comes in the morning.

O LORD, You favored me; You made my mountain st and strong.
When You hid Your face, I was dismayed.
To You, O LORD, I called, and I begged my Lord for mercy:
What gain is there in my bloodshed,  in my descent to the Pit? Will the dust praise You? Will it proclaim Your faithfulness?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hear me, O LORD, and have mercy; O LORD, be my helper.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You turned my mourning into dancing; You peeled off my sackcloth and clothed me with joy,
that my heart may sing Your praises and not be silent. O LORD my God, I will give thanks forever.
